title: Teen in white shirt was unreasonably attacked by HK Police

replies.msg:
This is a translated post from the following link:

有關今日係太子比黑警無理施襲的白衫少年朱智仁
https://lih.kg/1533787
- 分享自 LIHKG 討論區

This incident is extremely serious. Police not only stepped on freedom of speech, but also attacked an unarmed citizen, making his head flowed in blood. If you (HK Police) still thought that you are righteous, be at ease, the hell must have a place for you. You (HK Police) completely lost control, and had no seniority to be in this world.

The teen, in white T shirt and black shorts with an orange VANS backpack, carrying only notes and stationaries. When being search, not even a mask was found.



It happened around 2/9, 10:00pm, when the teen finished his Japanese language course, while passing through Prince Edward area (where protest happened) alone. He did not do anything other than taking photos and videos.

Around 11:00pm-11:15pm, the teen asked the Police who were separated to him by a road,
”Where is your conscience?”
He was immediately chased and beaten by 6-7 riot police, his blood was all over his neck and backpack.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bQgKEaEv20Y

He argued with the police for about 10 minutes without any violent language. But he was being threaten loudly by the police repeatedly. When the press asked if the police used excessive force, the police return with slam.



Around 11:15-11:30pm, the teen shouted his full name and we contacted his families and 「星火」(voluntary lawyer). At around 1:00am, the teen went to Kwong Wah Hospital for medical inspection with the lawyer. We are his friend and he’s fine now so no worry for now. I will tell if there’s other information.


The teen only asked a question and got beaten up like this. These police absolutely lost control . Perhaps next time they would used machine gun to rake at the protestors, killing all with opposite opinions. To be honest, a man would not hate another so much without any reason. You(police) know better than me what you have done, don’t blame when everyone hate you. There’s always a reason. I believe there will be a day when you all (Police) be exposed and criticized. Good luck with that!

Finish.

Fuck you HK Police! Die!
Push, you can ask anything question in English here
